text:
Created attachment 234774
Upgrade to 2.14.10

The new release (announcement linked to in the URL-field) is available since June 2. Among the fixed bugs is a "use after free"...

Also, I never understood, why WITH_GTKGUI implies the databases/evolution-data-server -- I've been commenting this part out locally for years...
